title: senecio sonchifolius
intro: Senecio sonchifolius, also known as False dandelion or Senecio, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Senecio sonchifolius has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for wound healing and skin issues. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a diuretic. Senecio sonchifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
